c74object.name: presetter
c74object.description: Access, rename, and filter your pattrstorage presets

method.name: bang
method.description: Send pattrstorage a "getslotnamelist" message for presetter to read and update its presets table

method.name: addfilter
method.description: The word addfilter followed by a symbol will add a new filter to presetter. The first available filter slot will be used.

method.name: renamefilter
method.description: The word renamefilter followed by two symbols will change the name of a filter.

method.name: removefilter
method.description: The word remove followed by a symbol will remove a filter from presetter.

method.name: addfilterslot
method.digest: Add a preset slot to a filter
method.description: The word addfilterslot followed by a symbol and a number will add a preset to the filter.

method.name: removefilterslot
method.digest: Remove a preset slot from a filter
method.description: The word removefilterslot followed by a symbol and a number will remove the a preset from the filter.

method.name: clearfilter
method.digest: Clear a filter of all its presets
method.description: The word clearfilter followed by a symbol will clear all preset slots from a filter.

method.name: applyfilter
method.digest: Apply a filter to the preset list
method.description: The word applyfliter followed by a symbol will filter out the list of presets to only include those added to the filter.

method.name: resetfilter
method.description: The word resetfilter followed by a symbol will reset an applied filter from filtering out the preset list.

method.name: resetfilters
method.description: The word resetfilters resets all applied filters.

method.name: readfilters
method.description: The word readfilters reads the filter file specified by the filename attribute.

method.name: writefilters
method.description: The word writefilters writes filters to the file specified by the filename attribute.

attribute.name: pattrstorage
attribute.digest: Which pattrstorage object to bind to
attribute.description: Use the varname of your pattrstorage object to allow presetter to communicate with it.

attribute.name: filename
attribute.digest: Filename to read and write filters
attribute.description: Specify a filename to read and write filters, which will be used in the readfilters and writefilters messages. If the autofilter attribute is set, all filter operations write to this filename after they're completed.

attribute.name: autowrite
attribute.description: When autowrite is set to true, all filter operations- adding, renaming, or removing filters, as well as adding or removing slots from filters- write to the file specified in the filename attribute.
